name: Baby stroller
description: Client has 2 young children (10 days old and 2 years old). They are a low-income family and reside in a HDB 1-room rental flat. Client is unemployed due to caregiving for the children. Her husband, who used to only work for 3 months, has been incarcerated recently, hence there is a loss of income to the household. Client requires a double stroller to ease her in managing them single-handedly when she needs to bring them out of the house.  However, she is unable to purchase one due to limited savings.

passiton.name: Maclaren Baby Stroller
passiton.description: Foldable Stroller, can fit in regular sedan car boot. If VWO is is in west/central area I can send over directly

name: Laptop
description:
The client is a single mother caring for 7 children. The family is in need of a refurbished, functional laptop to support the children's schoolwork and educational needs. The laptop would also assist the client in her job search and employment applications as she seeks new opportunities to improve the family's financial situation.
The family is on financial assistance and cannot afford to buy a new laptop. Your donation will greatly help the family.

contact.org: Fei Yue Family Service Centre @ Choa Chu Kang
contact.name: Claire Chen

Family has limited financial means and looking for a 2-seater sofa that is easy to clean, which would greatly ease the caregiving process and provide much-needed comfort for client.

name: Laptop
description: Family is a single-mother with two children in Primary 4 and Primary 2. The mother has lupus and ongoing health challenges, affecting her ability to provide fully for the children’s educational needs. The children currently rely on their mother’s mobile phone for their Student Learning Space (SLS), but the small screen size and limited functionality make it difficult for them to complete assignments, read materials, and type their work effectively. A laptop would greatly support the children’s learning and ensure they can participate more fully in school requirements.
